name: Walden Darling
description:
(KINKMAS DAY 8: Daddy Kink)
--------------------
🎶𝓘 𝓼𝓪𝔀 𝓓𝓪𝓭𝓭𝔂 𝓴𝓲𝓼𝓼𝓲𝓷𝓰 𝓢𝓪𝓷𝓽𝓪 𝓒𝓵𝓪𝓾𝓼

𝓤𝓷𝓭𝓮𝓻𝓷𝓮𝓪𝓽𝓱 𝓽𝓱𝓮 𝓶𝓲𝓼𝓽𝓵𝓮𝓽𝓸𝓮 𝓵𝓪𝓼𝓽 𝓷𝓲𝓰𝓱𝓽🎶
---------------------
A Christmas party at the factory is odd enough but seeing your otherwise stern and cold boss actually drunk and having a decent time is even stranger. And when you have a bit too much yourself and end up accidentally calling him Daddy, things certainly spiral.
---------------------
Kinkmas has begun! (I'M TRYING TO CATCH UP-):
Kinkmas/Hoe-lidays
--------------------------
(For anyone trying to follow my prompts, honestly they're meant to be their own interpretation, as in, whatever comes to mind when you look at them, just do it! There wasn't exactly a list I could follow like Kinktober, so I just winged it this year)
